title: London 2 Seater Square Folding Bistro Set with London Folding Armchairs
description:
Enjoy simple elegance and everyday functionality with the Royalcraft London Folding Bistro Set. Made from FSC 100% certified Acacia hardwood and finished with a natural oil treatment, this set celebrates the beauty of natural materials while offering long lasting strength and reliability. Compact and versatile, it is the ideal choice for patios, balconies, and smaller garden spaces.

The 70cm square folding table is designed with a central parasol hole and cap, giving you the option of adding shade during warm afternoons while keeping the surface neat and uncluttered when the parasol is not in use. Two matching London folding armchairs accompany the table, offering comfortable seating and timeless appeal in a simple yet refined style.

Practical Design, Lasting ComfortBoth the table and chairs feature a folding design, making them easy to store away when not in use or to move around your outdoor space as needed. Their compact form is perfect for seasonal living, while the solid Acacia hardwood construction ensures they remain dependable year after year.

What's Included

70cm square London folding table with parasol hole and cap

Two London folding armchairs

Key Features

FSC 100% certified Acacia hardwood with natural oil finish

Folding table and chairs for easy storage and flexibility

Compact 70cm square table, ideal for two diners

Parasol hole and cap included for shade options

Perfect for patios, balconies, and decking spaces

Make the Most of Outdoor MomentsWhether enjoying a quiet morning coffee, lunch in the sunshine, or an intimate evening drink, the London Folding Bistro Set provides everything you need for relaxed outdoor living. With its practical folding design and sustainable construction, it offers a timeless and thoughtful addition to any outdoor retreat.

title: London 4 Seater Square Folding Set with London Folding Armchairs
description:
Bring classic style and everyday practicality to your garden with the Royalcraft London Four Seater Folding Dining Set. Crafted from FSC 100% certified Acacia hardwood and finished with a natural oil treatment, this set highlights the natural warmth and character of responsibly sourced timber while offering strength and durability for years of outdoor use.

The 90cm square folding table provides generous space for dining and socialising, making it perfect for family meals, relaxed lunches, or evening drinks outdoors. With a central parasol hole and cap, the table gives you the option to add shade during sunny days, while maintaining a clean and polished look when the parasol is not in place. Four matching London folding armchairs complete the set, offering comfort, convenience, and timeless design.

Flexible Design for Everyday LivingBoth the table and chairs are designed with folding mechanisms, allowing you to easily store the set when not in use or move it around your outdoor space as needed. The chairs fold flat, making them especially useful for seasonal living or when space is limited. Sturdy hardwood construction ensures reliable support, while the natural oil finish protects and enhances the beauty of the wood.

Four London folding armchairs

title: Luxe Outdoor Kitchen 7 Burner with Sink, Pizza Oven and Fridge
description:
Elevate your outdoor entertaining with the LUXE Outdoor Kitchen 7 Burner with Sink, Pizza Oven and Fridge includes, a fully integrated, modular cooking setup where striking design meets exceptional performance. Built from black stainless steel with a durable sintered stone worktop, every element has been crafted to look and perform beautifully in any outdoor space.

At the heart of every configuration is a powerful 7-burner gas grill with integrated plancha, delivering precise multi-zone heat control for everything from slow-cooked ribs to perfectly seared steaks. Every variant includes a stainless steel sink with integrated flex spray tap, soft-close storage, a built-in rubbish bin and a bamboo sink cover that doubles as a cutting board, all finished with a sintered stone countertop and supplied with a rainproof protective cover as standard. 

Includes: 

• 7-Burner BBQ 
• Sink & Cupboard Set 
• Single Fridge 
• Pizza Oven 
• Black stainless steel cabinetry with sintered stone worktop 
• Stainless steel sink with integrated flex spray tap 
• Hot and cold water inlet connections 
• Soft-close cupboard and drawer storage 
• Built-in trash bin and bamboo sink cover/cutting board 
• Rainproof protective cover 
• Lockable castors for flexible positioning 

Measurements: (400.5cm total length) 

• Luxe 7-Burner BBQ - H:120cm x W:147cm x D:58cm 
• Luxe Sink & Cupboard Set - H:90cm x W:83cm x D:58cm 
• Luxe Single Fridge - H:90cm x W:57.5cm x D:58cm 
• Luxe Pizza Oven - H:119cm x W:83cm x D:58cm 

Guarantee: 

• 5 Year Structural Frame Warranty 
• 2 Year BBQ Component Warranty (burners, valves, ignition) 
• 1 Year Electrical & Refrigeration Warranty

Sold as a pack of four, the RIVEN chairs offer a complete seating solution for entertaining with family or friends, combining functionality with sustainable craftsmanship.

title: Natural Weave 826L KD Cushion Storage Box
description:

With its generous capacity and elegant finish, this storage solution is perfect for keeping your garden organised while complementing your existing furniture. The natural beige colour and hand woven double half round synthetic rattan weave create a timeless and versatile look that works beautifully in both contemporary and traditional settings.

Strong, Spacious, and Secure

The 826L capacity provides ample room for cushions, throws, and a variety of outdoor accessories, while the interior zipped lining offers extra protection, ensuring your items remain safe and secure across the seasons.

title: Deluxe Round Solar LED Cantilever Parasol - Grey
description:
The 3.5m LED Cantilever Garden Parasol is designed to create a spacious area of cooling shade over your corner lounging sets or dining table. To ensure stability, it requires a weighted base (not included). Its free-standing design eliminates the need for a central pole, allowing for versatile placement options.

Featuring an easy-to-operate crank and tilt system, you can effortlessly adjust the canopy position to suit your needs. The frame is equipped with integrated solar-powered LED lights, enabling you to enjoy your outdoor space into the evening.

Parasols not only provide shade and a relaxing spot but also serve as attractive ornamental features. This modern umbrella adds a classic touch, perfect for bringing your indoor fine dining experience outdoors while protecting you from the elements. The design consists of a circular fabric or plastic canopy stretched over hinged ribs, allowing for easy opening and closing.

With a shower-proof feature and a sun protection level of 50, this parasol is both functional and stylish. The powder-coated aluminium frame ensures durability and longevity.

Enhance your outdoor gatherings with the 3.5m LED Cantilever Garden Parasol, making it a perfect addition for summer evenings!

Features

Material: Polyester Fabric, Weather-Proof Coating & UPF Sun Protection Level 50

Colour: Grey

LED feature to use in the summer evenings

Round Parasol with Cross Stand

Tilt feature to adjust canopy position when required

Shower Proof and Sun protection level 50

Powder Coated Aluminium Frame

Stylish and Modern Design

The base shown in the images is for illustration purposes only and is not included with the parasol

Keep canopy closed when not in use and in adverse weather

The range of Royalcraft overhanging cantilever parasols is perfect for use with relaxers, bistros, corner dining and lounging sets where a freestanding parasol is required.

The Royalcraft standard range of parasols are ideal for use with our furniture sets and bases, with crank mechanisms and tilt feature, 38mm and 48mm aluminium poles and 6-8 rib options.

Set Includes

1 x Parasol

Assembly Information

This product requires some assembly ‚ approximately 30 minutes.

title: COCO Two Seater Sofa
description:
The COCO Two Seater Sofa is a confident expression of modern comfort, where clean lines meet a rich, inviting texture. The fabric brings a soft, velvety feel with depth and warmth, adding a grounded elegance to any living space. Designed for everyday lounging, its two-seater form offers generous comfort without overwhelming the room.

COCO balances contemporary design with a relaxed, understated presence. Its structured silhouette and softly cushioned form create a welcoming aesthetic, while the deep chocolate tone adds richness to both neutral and layered interiors.

Both visually striking and irresistibly comfortable, the COCO Two Seater Sofa anchors a space with quiet confidence, ideal for interiors that value warmth, texture, and timeless design.

title: Wentworth 6 Seater Comfort Dining Set
description:
Experience luxurious outdoor dining with the Wentworth 6 Seater Comfort Dining Set, designed to blend style and functionality seamlessly. Featuring a timeless design, this set enhances any garden or patio space with its classic aesthetic.

Constructed with a durable aluminium framework, this dining set is built to withstand outdoor elements. The hand-woven synthetic half-round rattan weave adds an elegant touch, making it both sophisticated and inviting.

The spacious 140cm tempered glass top table includes a parasol hole, providing a sleek, easy-to-clean surface ideal for shaded dining. Paired with six high-back comfort chairs, this set is designed for ultimate relaxation, ensuring support during long meals and gatherings.

With Weather Shield seat and back cushions, you‚'ll enjoy cozy seating that also offers protection against the elements, making it perfect for year-round use. Whether you‚'re hosting family gatherings or entertaining friends, the Wentworth 6 Seater Comfort Dining Set provides a comfortable and luxurious dining experience in any outdoor space!

Outdoor Dining Sets
Having a garden, or any kind of outdoor space, is a real privilege ‚ and one which should be maximised to ensure it is not taken for granted. If you are lucky enough to have a bit more space to play with, like a generous patio, creating different zones can help you make the most of it. Of course, lots of variations to choose from but, ultimately, having an area for alfresco dining will suit most needs.

Setting up an outdoor dining room is garden goals. This will provide a delightful place to host lunches and dinners, and its sheer heaven to eat breakfast outside on a spring and summer day. Whether you opt for an outdoor dining garden furniture set which boasts a dining table and armchairs for a smart, cohesive look or a table set with foldable, stackable or reclining seats for practicality and space saving. We have many dining garden furniture sets available from a range of materials such as rattan, rope effect, aluminium, responsibly sourced wood and 100% recyclable plastic.

The Wentworth Range
The Wentworth range is one of our most popular rattan garden furniture ranges. The range features neutral coloured synthetic rattan which makes this range timeless and suitable for any type of garden. With plenty of lounging and dining options, you will not be disappointed in the Wentworth rattan range to style your outdoor living space.

Features:

Product Material: Synthetic Rattan

Main Colour: Beige

Cushion colour: Grey

Rust Proof Aluminium Frame

Tempered glass table with parasol hole

Luxurious High Back chairs

Shower and stain resistant cushions included

Compliments any outdoor patio or decking space

Includes:

1 x 140cm Round Table (with tempered glass top)

6 x High Back Comfort Chairs

12 x Weather shield cushions

title: Pure 3x3m Pergola with Manual Louvered Roof and solar powered lighting - No Screen
description:
The Royalcraft PURE 3x3m Pergola is designed to bring shade, style, and year-round comfort to your outdoor space. Built from powder-coated aluminium with galvanised steel louvres, it offers lasting strength with a clean, architectural presence that suits any modern garden.

The manual louvred roof features a split design, allowing you to control each section independently. Open one side for sunlight while keeping the other closed for shade or shelter, perfect for mornings, late afternoons, or unpredictable weather.

As evening arrives, the integrated solar-powered LED lighting enhances your outdoor space with soft illumination. Choose between warm or white light, controlled easily via a button. With its durable materials, adaptable shading and built-in solar system, the PURE Pergola makes outdoor living beautifully effortless.

Key Features

Powder-coated aluminium frame with galvanised steel roof louvres

Split manual louvered roof, adjust each side independently

Solar powered LED lighting with warm & white options

Integrated Draining

Solar panel + battery system for sustainable illumination

Button-controlled lighting (no voice control)

Reinforced frame with 100 x 100mm posts and 80 x 120mm beams

Low-maintenance, rust-resistant, and UKFR compliant

Are Pergolas Waterproof?
Our Royalcraft PURE Pergolas are rain-resistant rather than fully waterproof.

Each pergola features a powder coated galvanised roof that can be tilted or fully closed to provide protection from light to moderate rain. When the louvres are shut, rainwater is cleverly channelled through an integrated drainage system built into the frame, allowing it to flow down through the legs and away from your seating area.

During heavier or prolonged rainfall, a small amount of water may enter through the joins, this is normal for galvanised roof systems, which are designed for ventilation and year-round durability, not complete watertightness.

Assembly Required. 
Privacy Screens not included.

Each pergola features a powder coated galvanised roof that can be tilted or fully closed to provide protection from light to moderate rain. When the louvres are shut, rainwater is cleverly channelled through an integrated drainage system built into the frame, allowing it to flow down through the legs and away from your seating area.

During heavier or prolonged rainfall, a small amount of water may enter through the joins, this is normal for galvanised roof systems, which are designed for ventilation and year-round durability, not complete watertightness.

Assembly Required. Privacy Screens not included

title: Luxe 6x3m Pergola with Solar Lighting System and Voice Control - No Screens
description:
Expansive, elegant, and intelligently engineered, the Royalcraft Luxe 6x3m Pergola is designed to define larger outdoor spaces with architectural precision and contemporary sophistication.
Crafted from heavy-duty powder-coated aluminium, this striking structure features a double-layer louvred roof that offers seamless control over sunlight and shade. With a simple manual handle, the louvres tilt or close completely, providing reliable shelter from sun and rain.
Perfect for entertaining, dining, or relaxing outdoors, the Luxe Pergola integrates a solar-powered LED lighting system that illuminates evenings with a soft, ambient glow. Its voice-activated control adds a touch of smart convenience, allowing you to create the perfect atmosphere with ease.
Designed for durability and year-round use, the Luxe 6x3m Pergola transforms any terrace or garden into a statement of modern outdoor living.
Key Features

Extra-large 6x3m footprint‚ ideal for entertaining and open-plan outdoor living

Powder-coated aluminium frame‚ strong, durable, and rust-resistant

Double-layer louvred roof for light, shade, and rain control

Solar-powered LED lighting system

Integrated drainage

Voice control for LED lighting

Manual handle for smooth roof adjustment

Reinforced structure with 100 x 100mm standing posts for exceptional stability

Low-maintenance, weather-resistant, and UKFR compliant

Dimensions: 6m x 3m

5 year structural warranty

Are Pergolas Waterproof?
Our Royalcraft Luxe Pergolas are rain-resistant rather than fully waterproof.
Each pergola features a double-layer aluminium louvred roof that can be tilted or fully closed to provide protection from light to moderate rain. When the louvres are shut, rainwater is cleverly channelled through an integrated drainage system built into the frame, allowing it to flow down through the legs and away from your seating area.
During heavier or prolonged rainfall, a small amount of water may enter through the joins‚ this is normal for louvred roof systems, which are designed for ventilation and year-round durability, not complete watertightness.
Privacy screens not included.

With voice-activated control and an elegant, minimalist frame, the Luxe Pergola redefines how you live, entertain, and unwind outdoors, every detail designed for effortless style and performance.

Key Features

Durable aluminium frame with powder-coated finish

Manual double-layer louvred roof for adaptable shading

Solar-powered LED lighting system

Voice-controlled illumination for modern convenience

Compact 3x3m footprint ideal for patios and smaller gardens

Integrated drainage

Reinforced structure with 100 x 100mm standing posts for exceptional stability

Weather-resistant and low-maintenance

5 year structural warranty

Are Pergolas Waterproof?
Our Royalcraft Luxe Pergolas are rain-resistant rather than fully waterproof.
Each pergola features a double-layer aluminium louvred roof that can be tilted or fully closed to provide protection from light to moderate rain. When the louvres are shut, rainwater is cleverly channelled through an integrated drainage system built into the frame, allowing it to flow down through the legs and away from your seating area.

During heavier or prolonged rainfall, a small amount of water may enter through the joins, this is normal for louvred roof systems, which are designed for ventilation and year-round durability, not complete watertightness.

Privacy screens not included

Companion Sets
The gardens of our homes can be a haven for peaceful sitting, social events and enjoying the nature of British spring and summer. Where we like to enjoy a moment of self-care and relaxation, garden companion seats can become a perfect place to sit back and chill out. Traditionally made out of rattan, metal or wood, companion seats generally come fully attached as two-person chairs with a table in the middle making them very a much sought-after garden furniture item.

Nowadays, you can find companion seats in all sorts of modern and contemporary designs‚ including the infamous egg chairs. Much like the bistro sets, this piece of garden furniture is a perfect accessory to any size garden patio or balcony. It is ideal for those who enjoy a cup of tea or glass of wine outdoors. It too provides an intimate and romantic setting outdoors.

Companion seats are generally made to sit two people (hence the name), so you'll want to make sure you have enough space to fit this in a place in your garden. Where you may already have a social seating area, companion seats are a great option for more mellow, solitary spaces that allow you to have some peace.
